# pdnd_producer_delegations (Data Source)

Lists PDND producer delegations with optional filters.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "pdnd_producer_delegations" "active" {
  states = ["ACTIVE"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `delegate_ids` (List of String) Filter by delegate UUIDs
- `delegator_ids` (List of String) Filter by delegator UUIDs
- `eservice_ids` (List of String) Filter by e-service UUIDs
- `states` (List of String) Filter by delegation states

### Read-Only

- `delegations` (Attributes List) List of delegations (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--delegations))

<a id="nestedatt--delegations"></a>
### Nested Schema for `delegations`

Read-Only:

- `activated_at` (String)
- `created_at` (String)
- `delegate_id` (String)
- `delegator_id` (String)
- `eservice_id` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `rejected_at` (String)
- `rejection_reason` (String)
- `revoked_at` (String)
- `state` (String)
- `submitted_at` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)
